sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (date_value Date, default_value Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY date_value;
INSERT INTO test_dates (date_value, default_value) VALUES (toDateOrDefault('2022-12-30'), toDateOrDefault('', '2023-01-01'));
UPDATE test_dates SET date_value = toDateOrDefault('invalid-date', '2022-01-01') WHERE date_value = toDateOrDefault('2022-12-30');
SELECT date_value, toDateOrDefault('invalid-date', '2023-01-01') AS corrected_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT toDateOrDefault('2022-12-30') AS valid_date, toDateOrDefault(null, '2022-01-01') AS null_case FROM test_dates;
